analysis:
【今日摘要】
今天市場情緒較為穩定，多個指數上漲，包括道瓊工業平均指數、標準普爾500指數和納斯達克指數。半導體股表現亮眼，投資者對AI超級計算機的期待可能是原因之一。另外，日本出口和進口增長速度遠超市場預期，出口增長19.3%，進口增長25.4%。同時，耐克將在中國切斷數千個線上分銷商，重構數位足跡，目的是穩定價格和品牌形象。

【結語】
投資者應該保持冷靜和謹慎，避免被市場情緒左右。當前的市場情緒可能是短期的波動，投資者應該關注公司的基本面和長期發展前景。投資者也應該考慮風險管理和多元化投資，以避免損失。

【精選個股】
NVDA - NVIDIA - 半導體股表現亮眼，投資者對AI超級計算機的期待可能是原因之一。
TSLA - 特斯拉 - 股價上漲，投資者對電動汽車的需求增加可能是原因之一。
AAPL - 蘋果公司 - 股價上漲，投資者對智能手機和電腦的需求增加可能是原因之一。

風險提醒：投資者應該考慮風險管理和多元化投資，以避免損失。

items.title: SpaceX Is Down 20%: Here's Why I'm Still Not Buying
items.summary: The stock recently slipped below its IPO price.
items.zh_title: SpaceX 股價下跌 20%：我還是不買
items.zh_point: SpaceX 股價近期跌破 IPO 時的價格，投資者開始擔心公司未來的發展。

items.title: Should You Buy Moderna Stock Hand Over Fist Before Aug. 5?
items.summary: The biotech has been on a tear lately.
items.zh_title: 是否在8月5日前大量購買Moderna股票？
items.zh_point: Moderna近期股價大幅上升，投資者應該考慮在8月5日前購買這家生物科技公司的股票。

items.title: Google (GOOGL) Backs Skilled Trades Alliance Across 30 States With BlackRock And Ford
items.summary: Google, part of Alphabet (NasdaqGS:GOOGL), joined BlackRock, Carhartt, and Ford to launch the Alliance for America's Skilled Trades. The alliance aims to expand access to skilled trades training and scale apprenticeships and partnerships across 30 U.S. states. The initiative seeks to address workforce shortages in critical trades across the country. Alphabet, trading at around $347.15 per share, is adding a new dimension to its presence in the U.S. economy by backing this skilled trades...
items.zh_title: Google 支持跨30州的專業工匠聯盟，與 BlackRock 和 Ford 合作
items.zh_point: Google、BlackRock、Carhartt 和 Ford 四大公司共同推出「美國專業工匠聯盟」，目標是擴大對專業工匠培訓的接觸，擴大學徒培訓和合作夥伴關係，解決美國各州對於關鍵工種人才短缺的問題。

items.title: Wistron Celebrates Grand Opening of First U.S. Smart Factory Marking Milestone in Global Smart Manufacturing Strategy
items.summary: Wistron Corporation ("Wistron") celebrated the grand opening of its D1 AI smart facility in Fort Worth, Texas, the site where the first NVIDIA GB300 Grace Blackwell Ultra Superchip was built and mass-produced in the United States. The US$ 700 million facility, spanning approximately 324,000 square foot, was officially unveiled during a ceremony led by Wistron Chairman Simon Lin and NVIDIA Founder and CEO Jensen Huang. Jessica Rogers, Director of the Economic Development Department for the City o
items.zh_title: 威斯特朗首度在美國落地智慧工廠
items.zh_point: 威斯特朗在德州福特沃斯市舉辦首間美國智慧工廠開幕典禮，該工廠是全球首間生產NVIDIA GB300 Grace Blackwell Ultra Superchip的工廠。該工廠耗資7億美元，佔地約3.2萬平方英尺，標誌著威斯特朗全球智慧製造策略的里程碑。

items.title: Review & Preview: Bounce
items.summary: The Dow Jones Industrial Average added 0.7% while the S&P 500 rose 0.9% and the Nasdaq Composite gained 1.3%.  Semiconductor stocks logged their best day in a month.  Overall, traders “shrugged off the news from the War in favor of buying the chip makers again, presumably on the hope that the AI hyperscalers, when they report second-quarter earnings over the next few days, will also report large capital spending plans,” wrote Macquarie Strategist Thierry Wizman.
items.zh_title: 回顧與展望：彈回
items.zh_point: 道瓊工業平均指數上漲0.7%，標準普爾500指數漲幅達0.9%，納斯達克指數則漲幅達1.3%。半導體股在一個月內取得最佳成績。交易者對戰爭消息不屑一顧，選擇買入半導體股，可能是因為期望AI超級計算機在未來幾天公布的第二季財報中，也會公布大規模資本支出計畫。

items.title: Mamdani says New York City lacks authority to arrest Netanyahu, calls him ‘war criminal’
items.summary: Israel's prime minister, Benjamin Netanyahu, is the target of an arrest warrant issued by the International Criminal Court related to the war on Gaza.
items.zh_title: 曼達尼稱紐約市缺乏權限逮捕內塔尼亞胡，稱他為「戰爭罪犯」
items.zh_point: 國際刑法庭對於以色列總理內塔尼亞胡發出逮捕令，與加沙戰爭有關。

items.title: Japan exports and imports grow at fastest pace in June since November 2022, beating estimates
items.summary: Exports climbed 19.3%, while imports spiked 25.4% compared to June last year.
items.zh_title: 日本出口和進口在六月份以來首次超越2022年11月的增長速度
items.zh_point: 日本六月份出口和進口的增長速度遠超市場預期，出口增長19.3%，進口增長25.4%，與去年同期相比。

items.title: Sony’s 'ironic' PlayStation disc decision upends gamer conventions and threatens a $7 billion resale market
items.summary: In 2013, Sony tweaked Xbox by showing how easy it was to share a PlayStation disc. Now, gamers say Sony has become exactly what it mocked.
items.zh_title: 索尼「戲劇性」PlayStation光碟決定打破玩家慣例，威脅七十億美元二手市場
items.zh_point: 索尼曾以輕鬆分享PlayStation光碟為賣點，現在玩家卻認為索尼已變成它嘲笑的對象，打破了玩家慣例，甚至威脅了七十億美元的二手市場。

items.title: Nike to cut off thousands of online distributors in China, restructure digital footprint
items.summary: Nike is streamlining its online business in China as the company looks to stabilize pricing and branding and get back to growth.
items.zh_title: 耐克將在中國切斷數千個線上分銷商，重構數位足跡
items.zh_point: 耐克正著手在中國線上商店進行重組，目的是穩定價格和品牌形象，重拾成長。這一變革將影響數千家線上分銷商，耐克希望通過這一措施恢復中國市場的競爭力。

items.title: Wednesday's big stock stories: What’s likely to move the market in the next trading session
items.summary: The major averages snapped a three-day run of losses on Tuesday, with the S&P 500 up 0.9% as chip stocks rallied. The Dow gained nearly 400 points.
items.zh_title: 星期三的大宗股票新聞：市場下一交易日可能會受到哪些影響
items.zh_point: 美股三連跌結束，標普500指數上漲0.9%，道瓊指數大幅上漲近400點，晶片股表現亮眼。

items.title: Super Micro’s stock soars as its margins unexpectedly double
items.summary: The AI server maker now expects gross margins to be in the range of 15% to 17% thanks to an improving customer and product mix
items.zh_title: 超微電腦股價大躍升 股利率意外翻倍
items.zh_point: 超微電腦預估毛利率將在15%至17%之間，原因是客戶和產品組合改善。

items.title: This is the ideal retirement strategy if you want to keep your healthcare costs down
items.summary: Plus, more ways to lower how much you pay out of pocket for medical care in retirement.
items.zh_title: 如果你想降低退休後的醫療費用，這是最佳退休策略
items.zh_point: 為了在退休後降低醫療費用，你需要規劃好退休資金，選擇合適的醫療保險，及時儲蓄以備不時之需。

items.title: SpaceX’s stock snaps brutal losing streak ahead of key Starship rocket launch
items.summary: Plus, investors just found out when insiders can start dumping their shares.
items.zh_title: SpaceX 股票終止慘烈連敗，迎接關鍵星艦火箭發射
items.zh_point: SpaceX 股票在即將發射關鍵星艦火箭之前終止連敗，投資人也得知內部人士何時可以出售股份。

items.title: I will definitely claim Social Security early. Why do so few people talk about the elephant in the room?
items.summary: “The strongest argument for claiming benefits earlier goes beyond the traditional break-even analyses.”
items.zh_title: 我一定會提早領取社會保障金，為什麼很少人討論這個問題？
items.zh_point: 提早領取社會保障金的強大理由，不僅僅是傳統的折舊分析。

items.title: Why energy stocks still look so cheap, even after their big rally this month
items.summary: Energy stocks are having a big month as oil prices surge on Iran war fears — but it’s not solely the conflict in the Middle East that makes the sector appear attractive.
items.zh_title: 即使本月大幅反彈，能源股仍然看起來很便宜
items.zh_point: 能源股因油價大幅上漲而出現大幅反彈，但這並不是中東衝突的原因所致。除了中東衝突外，還有其他因素使能源股看起來很有吸引力。

items.title: Stocks Sink in Broad AI Rout Sparked by China's DeepSeek
items.summary: U.S. stocks were mostly lower, with the Nasdaq leading declines as makers of AI infrastructure suffered steep falls, many in the double digits. Nvidia was down 16%.
items.zh_title: 美國股市大幅下跌，受中國DeepSeek影響
items.zh_point: 美國股市大幅下跌，Nasdaq指數領跌，AI基礎設施相關公司大幅下跌，Nvidia股價下跌16%。

items.title: Comex Gold, Silver Settle Lower
items.summary: Gold settled 1.4% lower, down two of the past three sessions, and silver fell 2.5%, down three of the past four sessions.
items.zh_title: 紐約金屬交易所金銀價格下跌
items.zh_point: 紐約金屬交易所的黃金價格下跌1.4%，銀價下跌2.5%，黃金連續兩天下跌，銀價連續三天下跌。

items.title: What to Know About China's DeepSeek AI
items.summary: The Chinese upstart says it has trained high-performing AI models cheaply, without using the most advanced chips.
items.zh_title: 中國DeepSeek AI的關鍵知識
items.zh_point: 中國一家新興公司宣稱，它已經訓練出高效率的AI模型，但不需要使用最先進的晶片。

items.title: DeepSeek Won't Sink U.S. AI Titans
items.summary: Panic fueling the selloff of Nvidia, Broadcom and other tech giants is overblown.
items.zh_title: 深海探索不會淹沒美國AI巨頭
items.zh_point: 對於Nvidia、Broadcom等科技巨頭的股價下跌，恐慌情緒可能過度膨脹。

items.title: Tech, Media & Telecom Roundup: Market Talk
items.summary: DeepSeek, SoFi and more in the latest Market Talks covering Technology, Media and Telecom.
items.zh_title: 科技、媒體與通訊產業回顧：市場熱話
items.zh_point: DeepSeek、SoFi 等公司在最新的市場討論中，涉及科技、媒體和通訊產業的發展。

items.title: Confluence Investment Management's Keller Q2 2026 Quarterly
items.zh_title: Confluence Investment Management的Keller Q2 2026季度報告
items.zh_point: Confluence Investment Management的Keller於2026年第二季度發布季度報告，內容可能包括投資策略、市場分析和投資績效等信息。

items.title: NPCT: High Leverage And Tight Spreads Equal A Clear 'Sell'
items.zh_title: NPCT：高杠杆和緊密擴散等於明顯的「賣出」
items.zh_point: NPCT指出，高杠杆和緊密擴散的組合可能會導致市場出現明顯的下跌趨勢，投資者應該考慮賣出。

items.title: Coal group urges Trump administration to provide financing help
items.zh_title: 煤炭集團要求川普政府提供貸款幫助
items.zh_point: 煤炭集團呼籲川普政府提供貸款幫助，以幫助煤炭業在經濟下滑時度過難關。

items.title: The J. M. Smucker Company Is Looking Tasty Here
items.zh_title: 史密瑟公司看起來很有味道
items.zh_point: 史密瑟公司的股價正在上漲，投資者對該公司的財務表現感到滿意。

items.title: Gasoline Prices Jump Back Above $4.00
items.zh_title: 汽油價格再次衝破4.00美元大關
items.zh_point: 汽油價格在短時間內大幅上漲，超過4.00美元，對於汽車使用者和經濟來說是一個重大的挑戰。

items.title: Phillips 66 EVP Vanessa Sutherland sells $743,522 of common stock
items.zh_title: 66菲利普斯執行副總裁范妮莎·蘇瑟蘭出售共股 743,522 美元
items.zh_point: 66菲利普斯執行副總裁范妮莎·蘇瑟蘭出售共股 743,522 美元，出售股份的原因尚未明確。

items.title: Crowdstrike CEO George Kurtz sells $4.08m in company stock
items.zh_title: Crowdstrike CEO George Kurtz 賣出 4.08 億美元公司股份
items.zh_point: Crowdstrike CEO George Kurtz 近期出售公司股份，總值達 4.08 億美元，可能與財務或個人原因相關。

items.title: StoneX CIO Abigail Perkins sells $628k in shares at $70.43
items.zh_title: StoneX CIO Abigail Perkins 賣出 62.8 萬美元股票
items.zh_point: StoneX 的首席投資官 Abigail Perkins 近日出售價值 62.8 萬美元的股票，交易價格為每股 70.43 美元。

items.title: ZipRecruiter EVP Amy Garefis sells $31,541 of company stock
items.zh_title: ZipRecruiter 執行副總裁 Amy Garefis 賣出公司股票 31,541 美元
items.zh_point: ZipRecruiter 執行副總裁 Amy Garefis 賣出公司股票，交易金額為 31,541 美元。

items.title: Form 4 AngioDynamics Inc For: 21 July
items.zh_title: AngioDynamics Inc 形式 4 報告：21 日
items.zh_point: AngioDynamics Inc 發布了 21 日的 Form 4 報告，內容可能與公司高層人員的股票交易有關。
